---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
description: "Open-source projects, community initiatives, and research from chen.ist."
from: markdown+raw_html
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Our <span class="gr">Projects</span></h1>
    <p>Open-source tools, community initiatives, and research from our team.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Community projects</h2>
    <p class="sub">Initiatives we've built for communities across Europe.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="https://caravana.chen.ist" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Cyber Bridge"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Cybersecurity Education</div><h3>Cyber Bridge / Caravana Securității</h3><p>Bilingual cybersecurity education program bridging the knowledge gap across Romanian communities.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="https://cicl.ist" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Cicl.ist"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Cycling & Mobility</div><h3>Cicl.ist România</h3><p>Interactive cycling maps, routes, and community resources for cyclists in Romania.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="https://riding.motorcycles" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Riding.Motorcycles"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Motorcycling</div><h3>Riding.Motorcycles</h3><p>Interactive motorcycle routes across Europe with multilingual support and community resources.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="https://clubul.computer" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Clubul Computer"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Education</div><h3>Clubul.Computer</h3><p>Technology club and educational initiative building digital literacy in communities.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Open source</h2>
    <p class="sub">Tools we build and maintain for the community.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i><h3>SecurityScan</h3><p>Automated security scanning for web applications. Helps developers identify vulnerabilities during development.</p><a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">View on GitHub</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-down"></i><h3>CloudCostMonitor</h3><p>Cloud spending optimization across major providers. Identify waste and reduce unnecessary costs.</p><a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-lk">View on GitHub</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Upcoming programs</h2>
    <p class="sub">Events and programs you can join.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4><a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html">AI Ethics Hackathon</a></h4><div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest</div></div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Open</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4><a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/2025.html">Summer School 2026</a></h4><div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Aug 1–15, 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div></div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Coming soon</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4><a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html">SpaceApps Challenge 2026</a></h4><div class="up-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> October 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div></div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-soon">Coming soon</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Want to collaborate?</h2>
    <p>We're always looking for partners, contributors, and sponsors for our community projects.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b"><i class="bi bi-github me-2"></i>GitHub</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
